AI for Your Sector

AI for the Future of Real Estate.

Qualify leads 24/7, schedule viewings automatically, and never miss a prospect. Let AI handle the repetitive tasks so you can focus on closing deals.

Solutions for the Real Estate Sector

24/7 Lead Capture

Our AI agent captures contact information and property interests from your website, social media, and property portals, day and night.

Automatic Qualification

The agent asks crucial questions (budget, desired location, number of rooms) to score leads and send only the most promising ones to your team.

Automated Viewings

For qualified leads, the AI can access your agents' calendars and schedule property viewings automatically, sending confirmations to all parties.

CRM Integration

All interactions and data collected are automatically logged in your CRM (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce), keeping your pipeline organized.

Ready to close more deals?

Schedule a free diagnosis and see how our AI solutions for real estate can increase your sales and optimize your agents' time.

Schedule Free Diagnosis
Mobizze

AI agency for businesses. We operate in Portugal and worldwide, creating automations that deliver results.
